name: Chinese economic transformation with Chinese literature
prompt: 帮我找 10 篇关于中国经济转型的必读论文，要包含《经济研究》和《经济学（季刊）》上的中文文献。

must_cover_branches: 乡镇企业与非国有部门发展
国有企业改革与所有制转型
财政分权与地方政府激励
对外开放与贸易自由化

notes_for_graders: Chinese summaries expected. Skill should proactively ask about Chinese literature and PDF download. Final list must include papers from 经济研究 and/or 经济学（季刊）.
